item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses opening another access-processing channel as the default, names the repeated pattern across dorm repair, classroom equipment, venue borrowing, and access requests, moves upstream to unified routing, ownership, intake boundaries, and escalation rules, and proposes consolidation before any new channel. No requested patch copy or implementation step for adding the channel appears anywhere."}
